intro: For years TopHat has stood for high-quality atmospheric tracks somewhere between Chillout and Future Garage. Give yourselves time and enjoy a sample of his mastery.
about: Joel Caffey, 18, from Chesapeake, Virginia. Student of biomedical engineering at Boston University. Started making music at age seven on piano, electronically around 2009. On Audiotool since 2010.

interview.a: I have learned that music is an extension of what we come to love, so let the essence of your heart flow effortlessly through your sound.
